subcodes.first_line: O tender twig of the blessed Tree! Thy numerous letters have been received, and their spiritual meanings were honey-sweet upon the palate of the soul
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرع لطیف شجره مبارکه مکاتیب متعدده واصل و معانی روحانیش حلاوت مذاق رحمانی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
